commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Oh that my head were waters, and my eyes a fountain of tears, that I might weep day and night for the slain of the daughter of my people. Hebrew is more expressive. (Calmet) "Who will give my head waters, (Haydock) or change it into water, and my eyes into a fountain. "(Calmet) Protestants, "Oh that my head were waters. "(Haydock) The miseries of my people are so great, (Calmet) a few tears would not suffice to bewail them. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
